name: Mary Magdalene
oracleText:
Lifelink
When Mary Magdalene enters the battlefield, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
Whenever another creature you control dies, scry 1.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalene" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Witness of the Risen Lord

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalene
classics.sourceNotes: A strong resurrection witness scene suits Mary Magdalene’s role perfectly.
